title: David's suicide (Oct 13 2024) — grief letter, two days
html:
TL;DR

  • Two-tab grief letter Yahir writes the day David kills himself, then continues into Day 2. Cameron spam-called him with the news — the same role-reversal Yahir flags himself: "similarly to how david broke the news to me about Vic."
  • Yahir is alone (no one to hug — this is pre-Austin, pre-Emily) and cries his way through a memory inventory of that summer with David: prom, Charlee crew, post-graduation camping, blue pools, Kai's house Smash Bros nights, a 4-day Oregon coast trip, the Goonies house photo, sand dunes, the "WE ARE GOING TO PERU" moment, REI belts and David's passport-belt — culminating in "saying good bye to our moms at the airport as their sons went on to adventure."
  • Last contact was winter 2021 — "three years since I've known about david. I haven't crossed paths with him since then and I never will ever again" — the guilt vector that gives the letter its sharpest cut: "I feel sorry for totally displacing you and acting like you didn't exist."
  • David's profile in Yahir's eyes: prototypical sports fella → artsy, piano-curious, community-college mechanic ambition ("work on F1 cars") that felt like filler, in love with Megan and Cabrienne, never expressed to Megan in fear of breaking the friend group, never spoke about his bisexuality or his experiences with Kai. "Two friends who had several common interests but never elevated beyond a certain point."
  • Day 2 turn: Chris Bumstead wins his 6th Olympia and his retirement line "if you numb the bad, then you also numb the good" lands as the lesson Yahir carries forward — "don't shy away. Appreciate your life." Tame Impala soundtracks the saved-state-of-David memory.

Key beats

  • Cause-and-effect ledger for David's parents: "You have left a pit for your mom. Your dad will never forgive himself." — Yahir explicitly absorbing the second-order grief.
  • Day-2 free-will question — "Is David's death proof that we have free will?" — first vault-instance of using a death as an opening into philosophy of agency.
  • Action items Day 2: keep in touch with Kai ("disproportionately impacting him bc of the relevancy and recency"), don't yet know how to manifest the legacy, "sit on it for a second."
  • This is the documented "David has slipped away" foreshadow from the Jan 19 2024 lonely list — 9 months earlier — coming horribly true.

Privacy

  • All names already in vault or non-uniquely-identifying first names (Megan, Cabrienne, Charlee, Mike, Andrew, Riley, Owen). Mike here is not Mike Vrabel — same-first-name collision; Andrew here may or may not be Pruhliere. Left at first-name in summary; queued to Potential Entities for disambiguation. No phone numbers, addresses, or financial PII.
  • Suicide is named explicitly in source; reproduced here because the vault treats this as a Fallen-cluster grief artifact, not for circulation.

Relations

  • david morris — entity (parent)
  • victor ruiz — Vic, prior fallen friend David broke the news of
  • 2026 02 20 fallen — the eventual memorial list
  • cameron lewis — broke the news to Yahir
  • kai — disproportionately impacted; Smash Bros / coast trip co-conspirator
  • peru — the "WE ARE GOING TO PERU" shared peak with David
  • grants pass or — the saved-state setting
  • 2024 01 19 THouhgts and things 11921 — the "David has slipped away" foreshadow
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — adjacent loneliness arc
